title: Erasmus Apartment Ano Poli: Stunning 1-Bed Base

about.summary: Erasmus apartment Ano Poli is a cozy private student accommodation choice in Ano Poli. This 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed apartment is ideal for students and digital nomads.

sections.title: 🏠 Erasmus Apartment Ano Poli
sections.content: Erasmus apartment Ano Poli offers a cozy, fully equipped student accommodation option. Designed for one tenant, this private apartment features a double bed and a clean setup that is ideal for students seeking privacy.
highlights: Comfortable configuration: 1 Bedroom / 1 Bed layout for single occupancy.
Move-in ready: Modern apartment setup in the traditional Kleious building.
Fully equipped: Dedicated workspace, washing machine, private kitchenware, and Wi-Fi.

sections.title: 📍 Location in Ano Poli
sections.content: Living in Ano Poli makes commuting easy. Aristotle University and City College are within walking distance or reachable via direct bus routes from nearby bus stations.
highlights: Everything nearby: Local supermarkets, marketplaces, bakeries, cafes, and taverns are 50 meters away.
Erasmus housing: Well-positioned student housing setup in a quiet traditional area.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This Erasmus apartment Ano Poli is a top option for remote digital nomads and university students. For official info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our City College student apartment.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is billed separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Erasmus Apartment Ano Poli: Stunning 1-Bed Base
seo.seo_description: Erasmus apartment Ano Poli ideal for Erasmus students. This stunning 1-bed base is near Aristotle University, ideal for digital nomads.
